---
title: ""
page-layout: full
sidebar: false
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    smooth-scroll: true
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{=html}
<style>

/* =========================
   GENERAL & ANIMATIONS
========================= */

body {
  background-color: #f8fafc;
  font-family: "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

@keyframes fadeUp {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(30px);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
}

.animate-fade-up {
  animation: fadeUp 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) forwards;
  opacity: 0;
}

.delay-1 { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
.delay-2 { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
.delay-3 { animation-delay: 0.5s; }

/* =========================
   HERO SECTION
========================= */

.hero-container {
  min-height: 95vh; /* Videonun rahat sığması için esnek yükseklik */
  height: auto;
  padding: 4rem 0;
  border-radius: 30px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-bottom: 4rem;
  background:
    linear-gradient(rgba(15,23,42,0.85), rgba(15,23,42,0.85)),
    url("[https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523050854058-8df90110c9f1?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop](https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523050854058-8df90110c9f1?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop)");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  position: relative;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

.hero-content {
  max-width: 900px;
  color: white;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2rem;
}

.hero-content h1 {
  font-size: 5rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  background: linear-gradient(to right, #ffffff, #e2e8f0);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  letter-spacing: -1px;
}

.hero-content h2 {
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  color: #38bdf8;
}

.hero-content p {
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  line-height: 1.8;
  opacity: 0.9;
  max-width: 700px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.hero-buttons {
  margin-top: 2.5rem;
}

.hero-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 14px 32px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: white;
  color: #0f172a !important;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 10px;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.hero-btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  background: #f8fafc;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
}

.secondary-btn {
  background: transparent;
  border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  color: white !important;
}

.secondary-btn:hover {
  background: white;
  color: #0f172a !important;
}

/* =========================
   STATS SECTION (GLASSMORPHISM)
========================= */

.stats-section {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 5rem;
  padding: 0 1rem;
}

.stat-box {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  padding: 2.5rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 24px;
  text-align: center;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,0.04);
  transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
}

.stat-box:hover {
  transform: translateY(-5px);
  box-shadow: 0 15px 35px rgba(56,189,248,0.15);
  border-color: #38bdf8;
}

.stat-number {
  font-size: 3rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  color: #0f172a;
  line-height: 1;
}

.stat-label {
  margin-top: 0.8rem;
  color: #64748b;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}

/* =========================
   BENTO GRID CARDS
========================= */

.bento-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 4rem;
}

.full-width-card {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
}

.content-card {
  background: white;
  padding: 3.5rem;
  border-radius: 28px;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
  border: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
  transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.content-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}

.content-card h2 {
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #0f172a;
  font-size: 2rem;
}

.content-card p,
.content-card li {
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  line-height: 1.9;
  color: #475569;
}

.content-card li {
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}

/* =========================
   DARK SECTION (TAKEAWAYS)
========================= */

.dark-section {
  background: #0f172a;
  color: white;
  padding: 4rem;
  border-radius: 28px;
  margin-bottom: 5rem;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(15,23,42,0.2);
}

.dark-section::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  height: 4px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #38bdf8, #818cf8);
}

.dark-section h2 {
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  color: white;
  font-size: 2.2rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.dark-section li {
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  line-height: 1.8;
  color: #e2e8f0;
}

/* =========================
   CONTRIBUTORS SECTION
========================= */

.contributors-section {
  margin-top: 5rem;
  margin-bottom: 6rem;
}

.contributors-header {
  margin-bottom: 3.5rem;
  max-width: 760px;
}

.contributors-tag {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 8px 18px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(14,165,233,0.08);
  color: #0284c7;
  font-size: .85rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 1.2px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
}

.contributors-header h2 {
  font-size: 2.8rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  color: #0f172a;
  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
  letter-spacing: -0.5px;
}

.contributors-header p {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  line-height: 1.9;
  color: #64748b;
}

.contributors-wrapper {
  background: white;
  border-radius: 32px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.15);
  box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(15,23,42,0.06);
}

.contributor-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 3rem 4rem;
  transition: background 0.3s ease;
}

.contributor-row:hover {
  background: rgba(248,250,252,0.8);
}

.contributor-info h3 {
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #0f172a;
  margin-bottom: .6rem;
}

.contributor-role {
  color: #64748b;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.social-group {
  display: flex;
  gap: 16px;
}

.profile-btn {
  text-decoration: none !important;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 14px 24px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.linkedin-btn {
  background: #0a66c2;
  color: white !important;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(10, 102, 194, 0.2);
}

.linkedin-btn:hover {
  background: #004182;
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 15px rgba(10, 102, 194, 0.3);
}

.github-btn {
  background: #0f172a;
  color: white !important;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.2);
}

.github-btn:hover {
  background: #334155;
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 15px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.3);
}

.row-divider {
  height: 1px;
  background: rgba(148,163,184,0.2);
  margin: 0 4rem;
}

/* =========================
   RESPONSIVE DESIGN
========================= */
@media (max-width: 992px) {
  .bento-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
  .stats-section {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .hero-content h1 { font-size: 3.5rem; }
  .contributor-row {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 1.5rem;
    padding: 2.5rem;
  }
  .social-group {
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    width: 100%;
  }
  .profile-btn {
    flex: 1;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .row-divider { margin: 0 2.5rem; }
}

</style>
```

::::: {.hero-container .animate-fade-up}
:::: hero-content
# Decoding Higher Education

## A Trend Analysis of Industrial Engineering Programs in Turkey

<p>Understanding the hidden drivers behind student demand, university
prestige, and regional educational dynamics through data analytics.</p>

::: hero-buttons
<a href="analysis.html" class="hero-btn">Explore Analysis </a>
<a href="data.html" class="hero-btn secondary-btn">View Dataset </a>
:::

<br><br>

<h3 style="color: white; font-weight: 300; opacity: 0.9;">
Team Let It Happen
</h3>

<div style="margin-top: 3rem; display: flex; justify-content: center;">
  <video controls style="width: 100%; max-width: 700px; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 25px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">
    <source src="data/teaser.mp4" type="video/mp4">
    Your browser does not support the video tag.
  </video>
</div>

::::
:::::

::::::::::::::: {.stats-section .animate-fade-up .delay-1}
::::: stat-box
::: stat-number
2018–2024
:::

::: stat-label
Years Analyzed
:::
:::::

::::: stat-box
::: stat-number
100+
:::

::: stat-label
IE Programs
:::
:::::

::::: stat-box
::: stat-number
81
:::

::: stat-label
Cities Covered
:::
:::::

::::: stat-box
::: stat-number
Multi
:::

::: stat-label
Integrated Sources
:::
:::::
:::::::::::::::

:::::: {.bento-grid .animate-fade-up .delay-2}
::: {.content-card .full-width-card}
## Project Overview

Industrial Engineering programs in Turkey exhibit significant
differences in popularity, student demand, and ranking performance.
However, raw placement statistics alone often fail to explain why
certain universities consistently outperform others.

This project investigates the evolution of Industrial Engineering
departments between 2018 and 2024 by combining official placement
statistics, demand indicators, and regional characteristics.

Using R and Quarto, we apply data analytics techniques to explore how
geographical location, quota structures, and demand intensity relate to
departmental success and national visibility.
:::

::: content-card
## Research Questions

-   What factors influence the popularity of Industrial Engineering
    departments in Turkey?
-   Do metropolitan universities dominate student demand?
-   How does the demand-to-quota ratio affect ranking performance?
-   Which universities demonstrate the strongest upward trends over
    time?
-   Are regional patterns observable across the Turkish higher education
    landscape?
:::

::: content-card
## Methodology Overview

This project combines modern data analytics workflows with reproducible
research practices.

**Analytical Pipeline:** - Data extraction using the `thestats` R package 
- Integration of YÖK Atlas and supplementary Kaggle datasets 
- Data cleaning and preprocessing in R 
- Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) 
- Machine Learning & Correlation Analysis 
- Statistical modeling and visualization through Quarto
:::
::::::

::: {.dark-section .animate-fade-up .delay-3}
## Key Takeaways

-   **Metropolitan Dominance:** Universities in major economic hubs
    consistently dominate ranking performance and student demand.
-   **Demand Exclusivity:** The demand-to-quota ratio is strictly
    associated with national success rankings and top-tier placements.
-   **Upward Trends:** Several Anatolian universities demonstrate rapid
    upward academic trends after 2021.
-   **Sector Strategies:** Foundation universities actively manipulate
    low scholarship quotas to artificially boost their selectivity
    metrics.
-   **Data-Driven Clarity:** Combining Machine Learning with EDA
    provides a profound operational view beyond raw placement
    statistics.
:::

::::::::::::::: {.contributors-section .animate-fade-up .delay-3}
:::: contributors-header
::: contributors-tag
Research Team
:::

<h2>Project Contributors</h2>

<p>This project was developed collaboratively as part of EMU430 Data
Analytics, focusing on reproducible research, statistical exploration,
and higher education trend analysis.</p>
::::

:::::::::::: contributors-wrapper
:::::: contributor-row
:::: contributor-info
<h3>Yusuf Bora Çavdar</h3>

::: contributor-role
Research Design · Visualization · Modeling
:::
::::

::: social-group
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/yusuf-bora-cavdar/" target="_blank" class="profile-btn linkedin-btn">LinkedIn
→</a>
<a href="https://emu-hacettepe-analytics.github.io/emu430-spring2026-boracavdar/" target="_blank" class="profile-btn github-btn">GitHub
Repo →</a>
:::
::::::

::: row-divider
:::

:::::: contributor-row
:::: contributor-info
<h3>Onur Furkan Gök</h3>

::: contributor-role
Lead Data Analysis · Data Processing · Methodology
:::
::::

::: social-group
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/onurfurkan/" target="_blank" class="profile-btn linkedin-btn">LinkedIn
→</a>
<a href="https://emu-hacettepe-analytics.github.io/emu430-spring2026-onurfgg/" target="_blank" class="profile-btn github-btn">GitHub
Repo →</a>
:::
::::::
::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::
